data_in.description: Preprocessed faahKO xcms result object (XcmsExperiment or xcmsSet with detected chromatographic peaks)

data_out.description: Feature group count and table of group sizes showing distribution of features across groups

domain_knowledge: Retention time similarity is a primary indicator that multiple detected ions (m/z) derive from the same compound eluting at the same chromatographic time.
The SimilarRtimeParam window parameter (20 seconds in this task) defines the maximum allowed retention time difference between features to group them together.
Feature grouping is typically applied after chromatographic peak detection and alignment to consolidate multiple ion peaks belonging to the same metabolite into single feature groups.
The faahKO dataset contains 8 LC-MS samples (4 knockout, 4 wild-type) used to validate feature grouping and downstream abundance correlation refinement.

direct_checks: verify that a pre-processed xcms result object for faahKO dataset is available as input (file_exists or accessible via standard xcms workflow)
verify that groupFeatures() function executes without error when called with SimilarRtimeParam(window=20s) on the xcms result object (script_runs)
verify that the output object contains a featureDefinitions table with a grouping column (field_present)
verify that the reported feature group count matches the unique group identifiers in the output object (output_matches_reference or value_in_range if a reference value is provided in the article)

verify that a table of group sizes (frequency distribution of features per group) can be extracted from the output and matches any reported table in the article (output_matches_reference, robust to formatting variations)
verify that all features in the input object are assigned to exactly one group (no missing or duplicate assignments)
expert_review: assess whether the grouping result is biologically sensible: features assigned to the same group should show plausible co-elution patterns consistent with a 20-second retention time window
assess whether the group size distribution is consistent with expected chromatographic behavior for the faahKO dataset (e.g., whether singleton and small-group frequencies are reasonable)

evidence_snippets.text: [other] When groupFeatures is applied to the faahKO xcms result object with SimilarRtimeParam using a 20-second retention time window, how many distinct feature groups are produced and what is the distribution of features across group sizes?: 'Grouping by similar retention time grouped the in total `r nrow(featureDefinitions(xmse))` features into `r length(unique(featureGroups(xmse)))` feature groups.'

[other] When applying SimilarRtimeParam(20) to group features by retention time, the faahKO dataset features were grouped into a specific number of feature groups with varying sizes, as shown by the table of group sizes produced by the grouping operation.: 'xmse <- groupFeatures(xmse, SimilarRtimeParam(20))
table(featureGroups(xmse))'

[methods] Preprocessed faahKO xcms result object (XcmsExperiment or xcmsSet with detected chromatographic peaks): 'This data set consists of samples from 4 mice with knock-out of the fatty acid amide hydrolase (FAAH) and 4 wild type mice. Pre-processing of this data set is described in detail'
[methods] Feature group count and table of group sizes showing distribution of features across groups: 'Grouping by similar retention time grouped the in total features into feature groups'
[intro] xcms: 'The *xcms* R package provides functionality to efficiently preprocess LC-MS (as well as GC-MS and LC-MS/MS) data.'
[intro] MsFeatures: 'General MS feature grouping functionality if defined by the `r Biocpkg("MsFeatures")` package'

[discussion] The discussion section provides no details about expected outputs, feature group counts, or group size distributions that would serve as reference values for validation: '_No changelog found._'

cmd: library(xcms); library(MsFeatures); data(faahKO); xdata <- faahKO; xdata <- groupFeatures(xdata, param = SimilarRtimeParam(window = 20)); cat('Feature group count:', length(unique(featureGroups(xdata))), '\n'); print(table(table(featureGroups(xdata))))
executable.grounding_notes: Unverified by the executable guard — command runs inline code (-c/-e); its API calls cannot be validated against package files. Treat this command as a best-effort inference; verify the entry point and APIs against the real code before running.

expected_outputs: Feature group count and table of group sizes showing distribution of features across groups
finding: When applying SimilarRtimeParam(20) to group features by retention time, the faahKO dataset features were grouped into a specific number of feature groups with varying sizes, as shown by the table of group sizes produced by the grouping operation.
inputs: Preprocessed faahKO xcms result object (XcmsExperiment or xcmsSet with detected chromatographic peaks)
methodology_summary: Load preprocessed xcms result object containing detected chromatographic peaks from faahKO samples
Apply groupFeatures() with SimilarRtimeParam(window=20) to group features within a 20-second retention time window
Extract feature group assignments and compute group-wise statistics (count, size distribution)
Validate: verify that the total feature group count and group size table match published reference results

research_question: When groupFeatures is applied to the faahKO xcms result object with SimilarRtimeParam using a 20-second retention time window, how many distinct feature groups are produced and what is the distribution of features across group sizes?

task_description: Apply SimilarRtimeParam with a 20-second retention time window to group features in a preprocessed faahKO xcms result object, and reproduce the reported feature group count and distribution of group sizes.
task_objective: Apply SimilarRtimeParam(20) to the faahKO xcms result and reproduce the exact number of feature groups and tabular distribution of feature counts per group.

task_outputs.label: Feature group assignments and size distribution

title: Reproduce retention-time-based feature grouping using SimilarRtimeParam(20) on the faahKO dataset

Synthesis grounding: the following tools/outputs were NOT found in the source paper and are inferred — verify before use: Feature group count and table of group sizes showing distribution of features across groups.
workflow_description: 1. Load the preprocessed faahKO xcms result object (XcmsExperiment or xcmsSet). 2. Apply the groupFeatures() function with SimilarRtimeParam(window=20) to perform initial retention time-based feature grouping. 3. Extract the resulting feature group assignments and compute summary statistics (total number of groups, count of features per group). 4. Generate a table showing the distribution of group sizes and verify against reported reference values.
